strategy: This is a 3-boss gauntlet and kill order is the whole fight: Bearded Dragon (Sun) must die LAST. If Sun falls before or with the others it Ra's 75% of your max health and full-heals the enemy team.
Focus the Moon and Star Dragons down first. The hitter funnels blades while supports blade and Feint the target dragon.

Watch the round 2 cycle: a +25% Sun Trap, ally blades and shields, then random support spells like Blinding Light, Guardian Spirit, Unicorn, Virulent Plague, Legion Shield, or Mass Infection. Cleanse infections and re-blade through their shields.
They have no incoming boost and 40% universal resist, so over-stack blades and traps to punch through.
Kill Sun last in a single clean hit. If any wizard joins late, Sun full-heals the team, so no stragglers.
cheatNotes: A late-joining wizard makes Sun full-heal the whole enemy team. Everyone must be in from the start.
If Sun dies before or at the same time as both other dragons, he Ra's 75% of your max health and full-heals everyone. Kill Sun last.
Even killing Sun alongside just one other dragon triggers a 50% max-health Power Nova and a full heal. Sun always dies alone, last.
Round 2 he places a +25% Sun Trap. Treat it as a minor buff and keep to your plan.
Moon or Star blades one of their own each round 2, so expect their damage buffed and re-Feint as needed.
They also shield an ally on round 2. Over-stack blades so a shield does not stop your hit.
Random effects here can be Blinding Light (accuracy down) or Guardian Spirit on a dragon. Carry accuracy and expect a revive-heal buff on them.
They may heal with Unicorn or Restoring Rain, or drop Virulent Plague on you. Pack infection removal and burst faster than they heal.
They can Legion Shield the enemy team or Mass Infect you. Clear infections before you heal and re-blade through the shields.
